title: Fix mob cache to only include mobs with images

log.context: Fix mob cache to only include mobs with images

Everything committed and pushed. Here's a summary of what was found and fixed:

---

**What was found:**

The mob cache had 69 entries, none of which had corresponding PNG images at `/mnt/data/hello-world/static/mob-images/`. The `mob-sprites.js` file contained sprite JS functions for all 69 mobs (plus 29 others for non-mob entities like personas/congress sessions), but the PNG render step had never been run for any mob. As a result, `skipGen: true` runs would select from the full 69-mob pool bu...(truncated)
